findings.location: sections.s1 — property table rows for defaultLanguage, supportedLanguages, cookieMaxAge
findings.description: The property table in s1 includes descriptions for three properties that are not stated in the source file. The source XML provides only the property names and example values with no accompanying descriptions for these three properties.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML shows: `<property name="defaultLanguage" value="ja" />`, `<property name="supportedLanguages" value="ja,en" />`, `<property name="cookieMaxAge" value="7776000" />` — no descriptions are provided. Only `cookieName` has a comment: `<!-- 言語を保持しているCookie名称 -->`. The knowledge file adds: defaultLanguage=「デフォルト言語」, supportedLanguages=「サポートする言語（カンマ区切り）」, cookieMaxAge=「CookieのMax-Age値（秒）」, none of which appear in the source.
